apexBlue.role: Primary brand color — logo wordmark, headers, links, buttons, primary accents

apexBlueDeep.role: Hero backgrounds, full-width header bands, section dividers, footers

apexBlueLight.role: Tertiary accents, hover states, lighter highlights

apexGold.role: Signature accent — the arc, accent bars, kickers, stat numerals, highlights

apexGoldDeep.role: Text-safe gold for small/bold labels or icons on white (bright gold fails contrast as text)

black.role: Body text, high-contrast headings on light backgrounds

white.role: Text on dark backgrounds, page background

surface.role: Very-light blue background tint for alternating rows / callouts
